final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            out <= {~out[0], out[3:1]};
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
